attributes.action: Target the drug-related crime in and around Streatham Hill
attributes.additional_details:
The community of Streatham Hill are being attacked and targeted on a daily basis. Our community is being threatened by drug related crime and nothing is being done about it. There are high rates of drug-related and mental health related crimes and harassment that occur on Streatham Hill’s high road every single day. 
As a scared mother who has been verbally and physically harassed multiple times, as a woman who has been too scared to leave the house; I ask the parliament for help.
attributes.background: Greater police presence on the streets of Streatham Hill. Target the causes of high levels of crime and harassment that occur daily. Support for drug addicts in the area. Support and intervention for people with severe mental health issues. Police patrols regularly outside the betting shops.
